description: Unexcused delays beyond 30 days on critical path milestones trigger delay credits defined in Schedule 2 (SLA & Service Credits).

description: For disputed invoices, the Client shall raise a written dispute within 15 business days with specific grounds.

description: Overdue amounts beyond 45 days shall accrue interest at SBI MCLR (1-year) + 2% per annum, calculated daily.

description: The Vendor shall provide a commercial and timeline impact assessment within 10 business days.

description: If OCS Rating Latency P99 exceeds 50ms sustained for >30 minutes, a service credit of 1% of monthly AMS fee is applied per incident.

description: Termination for convenience during the implementation phase requires payment of: (a) all completed milestone payments; (b) reasonable mobilization costs for work-in-progress (not to exceed 20% of remaining implementation CapEx); and (c) committed third-party costs that cannot be cancelled.

description: The system provides real-time stream processing using Apache Flink with sub-30-minute leakage detection.
